faqs.question: Why are crickets so common in Dyker Heights homes?
faqs.answer: Dyker Heights' abundance of landscaped yards, gardens, and older homes with basement spaces provide ideal habitats for crickets. They're attracted to moisture, vegetation, and the warmth of residential properties, especially as temperatures drop in fall when they seek indoor shelter.

faqs.question: How much does cricket control cost in Dyker Heights?
faqs.answer: Our cricket control services in Dyker Heights range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate a cricket infestation?
faqs.answer: Most cricket infestations are significantly reduced within 24-48 hours of treatment. Complete elimination typically occurs within one week, though severe infestations may require follow-up visits included in your service plan to ensure all crickets and eggs are eradicated.

faqs.question: Are cricket control treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and targeted application methods that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We can also offer eco-friendly treatment options for sensitive households while maintaining complete effectiveness against cricket populations.
